Captain Marvel (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $426,829,839Details
International Box Office $702,746,255
Worldwide Box Office $1,129,576,094
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $19,521,361
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $48,002,401
Total $67,523,762
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The story follows Carol Danvers as she becomes one of the universe’s most powerful heroes when Earth is caught in the middle of a galactic war between two alien races.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$153,433,423 (35.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.78 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:37.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$175,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,310 opening theaters/4,310 max. theaters, 7.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $557,301,842

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 8th, 2019 (Wide) by Walt Disney
March 8th, 2019 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: March 6th, 2019 (Wide) (Colombia)
March 6th, 2019 (Wide) (Thailand)
March 6th, 2019 (Wide) (Belgium)
March 6th, 2019 (Wide) (Taiwan)
March 6th, 2019 (Wide) (Slovenia)
Video Release: May 28th, 2019 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
July 15th, 2019 by Walt Disney
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of sci-fi violence and action, and brief suggestive language.
(Rating bulletin 2564 (Cert #52027), 2/6/2019)
Running Time: 124 minutes
Franchise: Marvel Cinematic Universe, Captain Marvel
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prequel
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Filming location (city or town): Baton Rouge, LA, Culver City, CA, New Orleans, LA, Oxnard, CA, Simi Valley, CA

Geographical setting: Outer Space
Plot point: Betrayal, Dream Sequence, Faulty Memory, Friends turned Enemies, Non-Chronological, Origin Story, Shapeshifter, Surprise Twist, War
Source material: Marvel Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure

Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Marvel Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
